# Navitas Semiconductor — 800V DC Power for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## 800V-to-6V Single-Stage Power Delivery Board
- 96.5% efficiency
- 2,100 W/in3 power density
- 1 MHz switching frequency
- 16x 650V GaNFast FETs in DFN 8x8 dual-cooled package
- ELIMINATES 48V intermediate bus stage entirely
- Thinner than a phone
- Debuted at GTC 2026 + APEC 2026

## Simplest Architecture
- Single-stage 800V direct to 6V point-of-load
- No intermediate bus converter needed
- Fewer components = higher reliability

## 250 kW SST Demo (with EPFL)
- Solid-state transformer demonstrated at APEC 2026
- 3.3kV AC to 800V DC
- SiC MOSFETs
- Research/commercialization stage

## AMERICAN (Torrance, California)
